info.title: Fluide Utils API
info.description: Shared platform utilities: notifications, file storage, document generation (PDFs, spreadsheets), and document jobs used across the suite. In the API playground, click Authorize and provide Bearer JWT (from token exchange), X-Fluide-Api-Key, and X-Fluide-Client-Id (fluide-developer).

tags.name: App
tags.description: Service root and build metadata. Use for quick connectivity checks.

tags.name: Prometheus
tags.description: Prometheus scrape endpoint in text exposition format. Configure your metrics collector to poll this path on each service.

tags.name: Notifications
tags.description: In-app and multi-channel notifications for suite products.

tags.name: File Management
tags.description: Upload, download, and manage files scoped to your organization.

tags.name: Documents
tags.description: Generate payslips, invoices, financial reports, and other PDF or spreadsheet artifacts.

bearer.description: Developer access token from POST /api/v1/developer-access/token. Paste the raw JWT; Mintlify adds the Bearer prefix.

fluideApiKey.name: X-Fluide-Api-Key
fluideApiKey.description: Developer API key (fl_dev_...). Required on every gateway call with a machine access token.

fluideClientId.name: X-Fluide-Client-Id
fluideClientId.description: First-party client audience. Must match the fluide_client_id claim on the JWT. Use fluide-developer for Connect.

fluideApiSecret.name: X-Fluide-Api-Secret
fluideApiSecret.description: API secret — send only to POST /api/v1/developer-access/token. Never use on product routes.

engagementType.description: Engagement module type (HR | PAYROLL | BOOKS | PAY)

verificationPortalUrl.description: Optional URL shown in verification footer

payslipId.description: Payslip id from payroll service (idempotency key)
